item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Federal Sports Blackout Protection Reform
item.description:
👀 Federal Sports Blackout Protection Reform

What

Federal sports blackout reform in the 119th Congress addressing regional sports network exclusive-broadcast extraction patterns.

What it does

  • Consumer-protection provisions for sports-broadcast bundling · streaming-service blackout limits · cooperative-class media composing.

Composes

#13 JukeBox (cooperative music + media licensing structural alternative).

🟡 Provisional. Help Each Other Help Ourselves.
